badges.academy: Academy rider (off the senior squad cap)

header.pendingTransfer: Joining {team} once his current stage race finishes
header.newValueBetaTooltip: Preview of the upcoming ability-based valuation. Not yet used for buying, selling or salary.

blocked.pendingTransfer: 🔒 The rider has been traded and joins his new team once his current stage race finishes. He cannot be traded again until then.
blocked.retired: The rider is retired and cannot be traded.

training.title: Training focus
training.riskNote: Higher intensity grows fastest, but carries ~{risk}% risk of a setback that costs part of the season's progress.
training.noRiskNote: Easy intensity grows steadily with no setback risk.
training.restNote: No ability growth on a rest day; fatigue recovers.
training.emptyFocus: Pick a focus to assign training.
training.actionErrorGeneric: Could not save. Try again in a moment.

actionErrors.auth: Your session expired. Sign in again.
actionErrors.network: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.

trend.title: Training · last 30 days
trend.note: A comparable training score is coming.

locked.title: Training is hidden
locked.body: You can't see or manage another team's rider training, form or fatigue. Sign him and it unlocks.

retired.title: Retired rider
retired.body: Retired riders aren't trained, so there's no active program, form or fatigue to show.

banner.auction: In auction · ends in {endsIn} · highest bid {highBid}

history.loadError: Trade history could not be loaded right now.

results.expandHint: Tap a stage race to unfold all stages.
results.loadError: Results could not be loaded right now.

jerseyDayLine.leader: Leader jersey · {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
jerseyDayLine.points_day: Points jersey · {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
jerseyDayLine.mountain_day: Mountains jersey · {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
jerseyDayLine.young_day: Young rider jersey · {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

palmares.emptyBody: Every career starts blank. The first result writes the opening line.
palmares.loadError: Palmarès could not be loaded right now.

scouting.loadFailed: The scouting report could not be loaded. Try again in a moment.
scouting.notScoutedBody: You don't know this rider's potential yet. Use a scout slot to get your scout's first read on him.
scouting.factor_age_upside: Young enough to have seasons of growth ahead
scouting.factor_ceiling_gap: Clear gap between today's level and his ceiling
scouting.factor_near_ceiling: Already close to his ceiling, little left to gain
scouting.factor_decline_risk: At an age where decline sets in
scouting.factor_value_gap: Priced below what the numbers suggest he is worth
scouting.factor_type_match: The verdict weighs his best rider type most
scouting.factor_form_unknown: Form and fatigue are not visible to scouts
scouting.factor_watch_races: Race results will confirm or challenge this read
scouting.rescoutHint: Scout him again to narrow the estimate.
scouting.typesLegend: Solid bar = level today. Shaded band = where his ceiling likely sits. The band is always a range, no scout knows a rider exactly.
scouting.capsMissingBody: Ceiling data is not available for this rider yet, so the per-type outlook can't be shown.
scouting.valueReadAbove: The model values him above his current market value.
scouting.valueReadBelow: His market value is at or above what the model expects.
scouting.scoutFailed: Could not send the scout. Try again in a moment.

scoutErrors.max_level: This rider is already fully scouted.
scoutErrors.capacity: Your scout is already fully booked. Wait for a job to finish.
scoutErrors.insufficient_funds: Not enough CZ$ to send a scout.
scoutErrors.auth: Your session expired. Sign in again.
scoutErrors.network: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.

interest.loadError: Interest data could not be loaded right now.

summary.own: {followers, plural, =0 {No managers follow him yet} one {1 manager follows him} other {# managers follow him}} · scouted by {scouted, plural, =0 {no rivals} one {1 rival team} other {# rival teams}} · {views, plural, =0 {no unique visitors} one {1 unique visitor} other {# unique visitors}} in the last 7 days.
summary.ownQuiet: No one has shown interest yet. He stays under the radar for now.
summary.scouting: {followers, plural, =0 {No managers follow him yet} one {1 manager follows him} other {# managers follow him}} · scouted by {scouted, plural, =0 {no rivals} one {1 rival team} other {# rival teams}} · {views, plural, =0 {no unique visitors} one {1 unique visitor} other {# unique visitors}} in the last 7 days.

whoScouts.title: Who is scouting your rider?
whoScouts.body: {count, plural, one {1 rival team has used scout slots on him.} other {# rival teams have used scout slots on him.}}
whoScouts.empty: No rivals have scouted him yet.

feed.title: Activity
feed.viewsTrend: Profile views {pct}% vs the previous 7 days

development.empty: No recorded development yet. The curve builds as the rider trains and seasons pass.

own.rising: He has gained {delta} in {type} rating this season. Training is paying off.
own.flat: No measured gain yet this season. The curve builds as he trains.

scouting.rising: Rising curve this season. Training plans are hidden for rival riders.
scouting.flat: Flat curve so far this season. Training plans are hidden for rival riders.

log.title: Development log
log.note: gains on {days} of the last {window} days
log.scoutingHidden: The training-driven development log is hidden for rival riders. You only see the recorded trend above.

projection.caption: solid = recorded · dashed = projection · shaded = ceiling range

curve.title: Power curve
curve.subtitle: Max power per duration · log scale

cp.title: Critical Power model
cp.read: W′ is the anaerobic reserve above CP: the work you can spend before fading; CP is the power you can hold almost indefinitely.

racePreview.title: Cycling Zones
racePreview.disclaimer: New physiological model, calculated from current skills. Does not affect race results yet.

auction.noSaleBody: received no bids (the rider was not sold)

auctionPanel.cannotBidOwn: You're selling this auction. Cannot bid on your own rider.
auctionPanel.errorFallback: The bid could not be placed

flash.label: ⚡ Flash auction (30 min)
flash.hint: Deadline Day: ends exactly 30 minutes after start

auctionStart.priceError: Start price must at least match Value ({amount} CZ$)
auctionStart.priceErrorOwn: Start price must be between 0 and Value ({amount} CZ$)
auctionStart.squadWarning:
Auction started.

Note: you are now running auctions equal to {total} riders (max {max}). The cap is a hard limit, so you cannot win more riders than your squad can hold.

sellRider.description: List the rider for sale at a fixed price on the transfer list. You can edit the price or remove the listing at any time.
sellRider.listedStatus: On the transfer list for {amount} CZ$

extend.description: Extend this rider's contract by one season at a renegotiated salary.

release.description: End this rider's contract. They leave your squad and become a free agent.
release.feeHint: The buyout fee is half the salary left on the contract.
release.freeHint: This rider is out of contract, so there's no buyout fee.
release.cannotAfford: You can't afford the buyout fee.

promote.success: Rider promoted to your senior squad.

swapOffer.cashHint: Positive: you pay. Negative: you receive.

celebration.title: You won the auction! 🏆
celebration.subtitle: The rider is now on your team

compare.title: Compare Riders
compare.subtitle: Add up to 3 riders to compare stats
compare.empty: Search for a rider above to start comparing

scouting.scoutTitle: Use a scout slot to narrow this rider's potential estimate
scouting.noSlots: No scout slots left this season
scouting.levelTitle: Scouting level. Higher means a more precise estimate
scouting.scoutToReveal: Potential is hidden until you scout this rider
scouting.pendingTitle: Your scout is already working on this rider
scouting.pendingShort: Report in {days, plural, one {1 day} other {# days}}
scouting.pendingJob: Scout working, report in {days, plural, one {1 day} other {# days}}
scouting.sendScoutJob: Send scout ({days, plural, one {1 day} other {# days}}, {cost, number})

training.title: Training focus
training.intro: Set a season-long training focus for this key rider. It nudges the trained abilities faster toward their ceiling.
training.gatedNote: Training shapes permanent ability and applies at the next season change.
training.noSlots: No focus slots left this season
training.assistantNoRisk: Faster targeted growth, no setback risk.
training.assistantRisk: Faster targeted growth, but ~{risk}% risk of a setback (lost gains) this season.
training.tradeoff: Other abilities grow a little slower.
